basic_details.job_title: EPI Graduate Apprentice Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Engineering Projects India (EPI) has officially released the Graduate Apprentice Recruitment 2026 notification (Advt. No. EPI/WRO/HRM/APT/001-01/2026) for 1 vacancy. Eligible BE/B.Tech candidates in Civil, Mechanical, Electrical, or Instrumentation disciplines with a minimum of 55% marks and aged between 18 to 30 years (with applicable relaxation for SC/ST/OBC) can apply from the date mentioned in the notification to 06-07-2026 via email as per the official portal. Selected candidates will be appointed on an apprenticeship basis with a monthly stipend of ₹10,000.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.age_details: Min: 18 years, Max: 30 years (Relaxable by 05 years for SC/ST & 03 years for OBC)
age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 30 years Age Relaxation: 05 years for SC/ST and 03 years for OBC (Non Creamy Layer) candidates.

qualification.education_qualification: BE/B.Tech (Civil/Mechanical/Electrical/Instrumentation) with not less than 55% marks
qualification.details: Graduate Apprentice: BE/B.Tech (Civil/Mechanical/Electrical/Instrumentation) with not less than 55% marks from a reputed Institute/University approved by AICTE. Candidates should not have completed three years after passing out of the qualifying examination as on 30th June 2025. Candidates awaiting results are not eligible. Candidates who have undergone apprentice training in any organization are not eligible.

salary_details.details: Rs. 10,000/- (Ten Thousand only) per month (Consolidated) shall be paid as stipend during the Apprenticeship training. They shall not be paid any output bonus or other incentives or any perks and allowances.

selection_process: Shortlisting on the basis of merit list formed on the basis of marks secured in Minimum required Educational Qualification.
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for EPI Graduate Apprentice Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 06-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

rows.engineering_projects_india_epi: BE/B.Tech (Civil/Mechanical/Electrical/Instrumentation) with not less than 55% marks
Min: 18 years, Max: 30 years (Relaxable by 05 years for SC/ST & 03 years for OBC)

content_sections.heading: EPI Graduate Apprentice Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the EPI Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download EPI Graduate Apprentice Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: EPI Graduate Apprentice Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: Graduate Apprentice: BE/B.Tech (Civil/Mechanical/Electrical/Instrumentation) with not less than 55% marks from a reputed Institute/University approved by AICTE. Candidates should not have completed three years after passing out of the qualifying examination as on 30th June 2025. Candidates awaiting results are not eligible. Candidates who have undergone apprentice training in any organization are not eligible.

content_sections.heading: EPI Graduate Apprentice Application Fee 2026
content_sections.text: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

content_sections.heading: EPI Graduate Apprentice Age Limit 2026
content_sections.text: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 30 years Age Relaxation: 05 years for SC/ST and 03 years for OBC (Non Creamy Layer) candidates.

content_sections.heading: EPI Graduate Apprentice Salary 2026
content_sections.text: Rs. 10,000/- (Ten Thousand only) per month (Consolidated) shall be paid as stipend during the Apprenticeship training. They shall not be paid any output bonus or other incentives or any perks and allowances.

content_sections.heading: EPI Graduate Apprentice Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates

rows.event: Date of Publication of Advertisement on EPIL Website
Time and Last Date of submission of online Application

content_sections.heading: EPI Graduate Apprentice Selection Process 2026
content_sections.text: Shortlisting on the basis of merit list formed on the basis of marks secured in Minimum required Educational Qualification.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for EPI Graduate Apprentice Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 06-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: EPI Graduate Apprentice Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the EPI Graduate Apprentice recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 06th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches before the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for the Graduate Apprentice post?
faq.answer: Candidates must have a BE/B.Tech degree in Civil, Mechanical, Electrical, or Instrumentation with at least 55% marks from an AICTE-approved institution.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Graduate Apprentice position?
faq.answer: The minimum age is 18 years and the maximum age is 30 years. Age relaxation is applicable for SC/ST and OBC candidates.

faq.question: Q4. How will candidates be selected for the Graduate Apprentice role?
faq.answer: Selection will be based on a merit list prepared from the marks obtained in the minimum required educational qualification.

faq.question: Q5. What is the stipend offered to the Graduate Apprentice?
faq.answer: A consolidated stipend of Rs. 10,000/- per month will be paid during the apprenticeship training period.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee has been mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. Can candidates who have completed their degree more than three years ago apply?
faq.answer: No, candidates should not have completed three years after passing out of the qualifying examination as on 30th June 2025.

faq.question: Q8. Are candidates awaiting their results eligible to apply?
faq.answer: No, candidates who are awaiting their results are not eligible to apply for this apprenticeship.

faq.question: Q9. What documents need to be sent along with the application via email?
faq.answer: You need to send your bio-data along with self-attested copies of educational qualification certificates and proof of date of birth.

faq.question: Q10. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode is through email. Candidates need to send their applications to the specified email address.
